case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. IAN M HANNULA

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-06-2017 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUN-06-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ROBERT S KENNARD, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-12-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-29-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
